generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? The new civil defense budget cuts are putting our families at risk. While the government claims these cuts are necessary for 'efficiency,' they're actually reducing critical preparedness programs that keep us safe. Remember the 2024 tornado outbreak? Communities with proper preparedness plans fared much better. We can't afford to gamble with our safety. #CivilDefenseMatters #SafetyFirst
